mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_memories (pet_id, memory_key, memory_value, type, level, state, importance, weight, access_count, embedding, version, previous_value) VALUES (#{petId}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryValue}, #{type}, #{level}, #{state}, #{importance}, #{weight}, #{accessCount}, #{embedding}, #{version}, #{previousValue})
mapper.update: UPDATE pet_memories SET memory_value = #{memoryValue}, importance = #{importance}, weight = #{weight}, level = #{level}, version = #{version}, previous_value = #{previousValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND state = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY importance DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND level = 'PERMANENT' AND state = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY importance DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE state = 'ACTIVE' AND level != 'PERMANENT'
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE state = 'ACTIVE' AND level != 'PERMANENT' AND weight < #{weightThreshold}
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE state = 'ARCHIVED' AND archived_at IS NOT NULL AND archived_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE state = 'DELETED' AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE pet_memories SET weight = #{weight}, state = #{state}, archived_at = #{archivedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pet_memories SET access_count = access_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pet_memories SET embedding = #{embedding}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
